top_findings.summary: The skill requests or uses iMessage for handling two-factor authentication (2FA) verification, which involves accessing personal messaging data. This is excessive and unrelated to the primary purpose of managing Zendesk Chat conversations, support tickets, and customer service operations. 2FA codes can be securely obtained through user input or standard authentication prompts without granting the skill access to iMessage, a separate communication service containing sensitive user data.
top_findings.impact: OVERREACH: Data Over-collection - The skill requests or uses iMessage for handling two-factor authentication (2FA) verification, which involves accessing personal messaging data. This is excessive and unrelated to the primary purpose of managing Zendesk Chat conversations, support tickets, and customer service operations. 2FA codes can be securely obtained through user input or standard authentication prompts without granting the skill access to iMessage, a separate communication service containing sensitive user data.
